query:
SELECT mr.id, mr.title, mr.requested_by, mr.requested_date, mr.duration_minutes, mr.status, mr.created_at, u.name as requester_name 
FROM meeting_requests mr 
LEFT JOIN users u ON mr.requested_by = u.id 
ORDER BY mr.created_at DESC 
LIMIT 1;
